name: Made Beaver
short_description: Build a fur trading empire across North America—navigate commerce, diplomacy, and survival in this deep historical simulation.
detailed_description:
Build a fur trading empire in the rich, historical world of 18th-century North America. Start with a single, modest cabin and strategically expand your influence to amass a fortune. Your ambition is the only limit on the wild frontier.

CHOOSE YOUR NATION

Lead your enterprise as Canada, France, Great Britain, Netherlands, Russia, Spain, Sweden, or the United States—each with unique strengths, historical advantages, and strategic challenges. Or, for a truly balanced experience, play as the neutral nation of Beaverland.

FORGE ALLIANCES

The land is home to hundreds of tribal nations. Your reputation is your most valuable asset, defined through key decisions. Supplying a tribe with weapons will strengthen your standing, while dealing in alcohol or arming their enemies will damage it. A high reputation increases the volume of goods a tribe will offer, while a poor reputation can see you shut out of their territory entirely, or even go to war.

A LIVING ECOSYSTEM

Trade in a world with a dynamic ecosystem based on historical migration patterns. Your choices have lasting consequences, forcing you to expand and adapt to an ever-changing landscape.

A UNIQUE TRADING EXPERIENCE

Made Beaver is a unique blend of deep economic strategy and rich historical simulation. While your goal is profit, your path is paved with history. Crafted by a solo developer committed to historical accuracy, every detail—from trade routes and prices, to furs, tribes, and settlements—is designed to create an authentic and challenging experience that you won't find in any other trading game.

Ready to carve your name into history? Launch your trading empire today and become the master of the fur trade!
